log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Grung — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 4 falling damage. HP: 174/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 13/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Grung — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Grung — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Grung — Bardic Musician.
→ Grung — Bardic Musician healed for 8 HP. HP: 21/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 3/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
